finding_results.notes: Appointment time was normalized to Thursday 12:40 and downstream schedule cues were reconciled (return expectation, clinic intake timing, and corridor time-of-day) to remove contradictory timing logic.

Later repetitive symptom-thesis restatements were compressed and replaced with consequential logistics decisions: formal high-risk note visibility, whistle/phone escalation protocol, cab-fare contingency, and a concrete bag-placement decision under expected Peter opposition.

The closing cluster now stays inside Noreen-accessible perception and lands on embodied consequence (what she will physically stage in the house and how she will act if blocked), removing unmarked Elsie interior certainty and abstract thesis phrasing.

Accounting lexicon was reduced to a single signature cue, and Peter's control behavior was diversified into household access control, social-surveillance pressure, road/liability framing, and return-time gatekeeping tied directly to clinic attendance.

summary: All packet findings were addressed in-place: chapter-time continuity is now coherent with the boundary handoff, repetitive warning exposition was converted into consequential action planning, ending POV is constrained to Noreen with concrete stakes, and over-repeated accounting diction was replaced by varied control mechanisms grounded in clinic-access conflict.
